title: DeepMind AlphaFold 3 Expands to Predict Full Protein Interaction Networks
summary: Google DeepMind has extended AlphaFold 3 to model entire protein-protein interaction networks at the proteome scale, enabling researchers to map disease pathways and drug targets with unprecedented accuracy. Early results show a 40% improvement in predicting novel binding sites over previous methods.
shareText: DeepMind extended AlphaFold 3 to map full protein interaction networks at proteome scale — 40% better at finding novel drug binding sites. AI is transforming medicine. 🧬 #AI #AlphaFold #DeepMind
